paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.25, representing a 5.31% change from the prior close and a -27.89% change over a window of 21 sessions. There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include discussions of the company's completion of a $375 million offering of 5.00% senior convertible notes and the resignation of director designee Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns. Articles from simplywall.st and Yahoo Finance have reported on the potential impact of these events on the company's stock price and governance.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031 and the resignation of director Miles Everson.
